rag_rules: Fix syntax errors in AGREE contracts by correcting invalid input patterns like missing brackets or incorrect use of 'in' keyword.
Ensure AGREE assumptions and guarantees refer to valid component ports within appropriate scopes.
generic_rules: When generating AGREE contracts, validate that all identifiers are visible and properly typed in the current scope.
Avoid introducing package-qualified names or types not present in the AADL model's dependencies.
Use only declared helpers or visible AADL features in AGREE expressions to prevent type resolution errors.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks within valid AADL component scopes.
Assumptions and guarantees referencing ports must be placed in component type scopes; bindings go in implementation scopes.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce new package references or data types not declared in the AADL model.
Do not generate clauses that reference unresolved identifiers or mismatched types.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics related to syntax errors in unrelated components
